meta.pageTitle: Edraak Systems | Quality Control & Traceability Solutions for Textiles
meta.metaDescription: Advanced machine vision and AI-powered quality control solutions for textile, apparel, and manufacturing industries. Real-time traceability and defect detection.

hero.title: AI Vision System.
hero.description: AI-powered vision platform delivering customizable, scalable solutions for quality control, traceability, and process optimization across industries.

items.title: Superhuman Inspection
items.description: Micro-level accuracy with high-resolution fabric imagery

items.title: Real-time Detection
items.description: AI-powered defect identification as fabric moves

items.title: Yield Optimization
items.description: Integrated engine for improved cutting plans

items.title: Digital Traceability
items.description: Complete fabric history from loom to finished goods

items.name: Greige Fabric
items.description: Inspect raw fabric straight from the loom, detecting knots, slubs, holes, and uneven weave.

items.name: Dyed Fabric
items.description: Check for uneven dyeing, stains, dye marks, and streaks visible post-dyeing.

items.name: Denim
items.description: Specialized detection for streaks, neps, barre marks, and finishing defects.

items.name: On-Loom
items.description: Real-time monitoring during weaving with instant operator alerts.

advancedTechnology.heading: Advanced Technology.
features: Superhuman inspection speed with Micro-level accuracy
High-resolution fabric imagery for advanced defect detection
Integrated with optimization engine for improved yield
Synchronized with cutting machines for efficient roll-making
Digital traceability and reduced reliance on manual inspection

otherIndustries.heading: Other Industries.
otherIndustries.description: EVS provides reliable camera-based inspection for pharma, food, electronics, and automotive industries.

getStartedCta.title: Ready to Upgrade Your Quality Control?
getStartedCta.description: Join leading textile manufacturers who trust EVS for fabric inspection.
